title: ajuga ciliata var. ciliata
intro: Ajuga ciliata var. ciliata, also known as the Himalayan bugle or Ajuga ciliata, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is commonly found in the Himalayas and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Ajuga ciliata var. ciliata are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
